characters.name: John_Wayne
characters.voice_description: Western drawl authority. Laconic, direct, unhurried. A man of few words, all of them certain. Recording style: 1960s Hollywood film, warm and direct.
characters.voice_archetype: Western drawl authority. Laconic, direct, unhurried. A man of few words, all of them certain.

characters.name: Winston_Churchill
characters.voice_description: Gravelly, defiant, oratorical. Deliberate cadence, rolling emphasis, unstoppable conviction. Recording style: 1940s BBC wartime broadcast, narrow bandwidth, slight tape hiss.
characters.voice_archetype: Gravelly, defiant, oratorical. Deliberate cadence, rolling emphasis, unstoppable conviction.

characters.name: Angie_Dickinson
characters.voice_description: Cool, glamorous, slightly husky. Controlled, confident, stylish. Recording style: 1970s US network drama, warm and controlled.
characters.voice_archetype: Cool, glamorous, slightly husky. Controlled, confident, stylish.

characters.name: Audrey_Hepburn
characters.voice_description: Soft, elegant, breathy. Gentle, refined, delicate, emotionally warm. Recording style: 1960s Hollywood, airy and intimate, light compression.
characters.voice_archetype: Soft, elegant, breathy. Gentle, refined, delicate, emotionally warm.

characters.name: BBC_Female_Newsreader
characters.voice_description: Precise, authoritative, composed. Clear upper-RP female. No emotion leaked — pure information delivery. Recording style: 1960s BBC news broadcast, crisp mono.
characters.voice_archetype: Precise, authoritative, composed. Clear upper-RP female. No emotion leaked — pure information delivery.

characters.name: Barbara_Stanwyck
characters.voice_description: Tough, grounded, no-nonsense. Strong, direct, authoritative. Recording style: 1950s Hollywood drama, dry and direct, minimal reverb.
characters.voice_archetype: Tough, grounded, no-nonsense. Strong, direct, authoritative.

characters.name: Cloris_Leachman
characters.voice_description: Comedic, sharp, expressive. Sarcastic, witty, characterful. Recording style: 1970s US sitcom, lively and punchy.
characters.voice_archetype: Comedic, sharp, expressive. Sarcastic, witty, characterful.

characters.name: Darth_Vader_Jones
characters.voice_description: Resonant menace, absolute authority. Every word a command. Breathing part of the performance. Recording style: 1970s film audio, deep, slightly processed.
characters.voice_archetype: Resonant menace, absolute authority. Every word a command. Breathing part of the performance.

characters.name: David_Attenborough
characters.voice_description: Reverent, precise, gently astonished. Finds the extraordinary in the ordinary. Unhurried observation. Recording style: 1970s BBC nature documentary, clean, intimate.
characters.voice_archetype: Reverent, precise, gently astonished. Finds the extraordinary in the ordinary. Unhurried observation.

characters.name: Debbie_Reynolds
characters.voice_description: Cheerful, musical, expressive. Bubbly, lively, wholesome. Recording style: 1950s American variety, warm and bright.
characters.voice_archetype: Cheerful, musical, expressive. Bubbly, lively, wholesome.

characters.name: Diana_Dors
characters.voice_description: Playful, sultry, confident. Breathy glamour with British cheekiness. Recording style: 1950s British film, warm mono, slight tape saturation.
characters.voice_archetype: Playful, sultry, confident. Breathy glamour with British cheekiness.

characters.name: Diana_Rigg
characters.voice_description: Elegant, razor-sharp, poised. Cool confidence, mid-to-upper RP, dry wit, controlled power. Recording style: 1960s-70s BBC drama, polished RP, tight dynamic control.
characters.voice_archetype: Elegant, razor-sharp, poised. Cool confidence, mid-to-upper RP, dry wit, controlled power.

characters.name: Elizabeth_Taylor
characters.voice_description: Rich, dramatic, regal. Smooth, powerful, emotionally intense. Recording style: 1960s Hollywood film, lush and wide, some room.
characters.voice_archetype: Rich, dramatic, regal. Smooth, powerful, emotionally intense.

characters.name: Franklin_D_Roosevelt
characters.voice_description: Patrician warmth. Paternal, steady, fireside intimacy. Reassuring authority. Recording style: 1930s-40s radio broadcast, narrow bandwidth, warm low-end.
characters.voice_archetype: Patrician warmth. Paternal, steady, fireside intimacy. Reassuring authority.

characters.name: Gandalf_McKellen
characters.voice_description: Ancient wisdom, thunderous authority, gentle cryptic warmth. The weight of ages behind every word. Recording style: Epic film audio, deep, resonant, slight reverb.
characters.voice_archetype: Ancient wisdom, thunderous authority, gentle cryptic warmth. The weight of ages behind every word.

characters.name: Goofy
characters.voice_description: Bumbling, loveable, guileless. That laugh, generous spirit — things go wrong but life is fun. Recording style: 1960s Disney studio, warm, playful.
characters.voice_archetype: Bumbling, loveable, guileless. That laugh, generous spirit — things go wrong but life is fun.

characters.name: Honor_Blackman
characters.voice_description: Deep, confident, seductive. Controlled, powerful, unmistakably cool. Recording style: 1960s BBC drama, deep register, controlled compression.
characters.voice_archetype: Deep, confident, seductive. Controlled, powerful, unmistakably cool.

characters.name: James_Bond_Connery
characters.voice_description: 1960s spy cool. Dry wit, effortless confidence, slight Scottish edge. Never rattled. Recording style: 1960s film audio, clean, slightly warm, confident presence.
characters.voice_archetype: 1960s spy cool. Dry wit, effortless confidence, slight Scottish edge. Never rattled.

characters.name: Jane_Fonda
characters.voice_description: Clear, confident, modern. Assertive, intelligent, energetic. Recording style: 1970s American, clean and forward, natural dynamic range.
characters.voice_archetype: Clear, confident, modern. Assertive, intelligent, energetic.

characters.name: Joanna_Lumley
characters.voice_description: Velvety, posh, glamorous. Smooth, warm, slightly husky, effortless charm. Recording style: 1970s ITV colour drama, warm midrange, light saturation.
characters.voice_archetype: Velvety, posh, glamorous. Smooth, warm, slightly husky, effortless charm.

characters.name: John_F_Kennedy
characters.voice_description: New England authority. Crisp, visionary, measured urgency. Youth and gravitas combined. Recording style: 1960s American TV broadcast, clean but period-compressed.
characters.voice_archetype: New England authority. Crisp, visionary, measured urgency. Youth and gravitas combined.

characters.name: Judi_Dench
characters.voice_description: Strong, authoritative, expressive. Precise diction, emotional depth, commanding presence. Recording style: 1970s BBC drama, restrained but resonant.
characters.voice_archetype: Strong, authoritative, expressive. Precise diction, emotional depth, commanding presence.

characters.name: Julie_Andrews
characters.voice_description: Crystal-clear diction, musical, warm. Bright, articulate, nurturing, perfect pitch in speech. Recording style: 1960s Hollywood film, bright EQ, clean studio presence.
characters.voice_archetype: Crystal-clear diction, musical, warm. Bright, articulate, nurturing, perfect pitch in speech.

characters.name: Katharine_Hepburn
characters.voice_description: Clipped, rapid, confident. Sharp wit, intellectual, unmistakable cadence. Recording style: 1940s-60s Hollywood, crisp and clipped, bright upper mids.
characters.voice_archetype: Clipped, rapid, confident. Sharp wit, intellectual, unmistakable cadence.

characters.name: King_Charles_III
characters.voice_description: Thoughtful, slightly formal, reflective. Modern British sovereign, duty and earnestness. Recording style: 1970s BBC broadcast, clean, warm midrange.
characters.voice_archetype: Thoughtful, slightly formal, reflective. Modern British sovereign, duty and earnestness.

characters.name: King_George_VI
characters.voice_description: Earnest, determined, quietly brave. Speech hard-won, warmth beneath formality. Recording style: 1940s BBC wartime radio, narrow bandwidth, slight hiss.
characters.voice_archetype: Earnest, determined, quietly brave. Speech hard-won, warmth beneath formality.

characters.name: Lucille_Ball
characters.voice_description: Expressive, comedic, chaotic energy. Big emotional range, fast shifts, iconic rasp. Recording style: 1950s CBS sitcom, period mono, light buzz and tape warmth.
characters.voice_archetype: Expressive, comedic, chaotic energy. Big emotional range, fast shifts, iconic rasp.

characters.name: Martin_Luther_King_Jr
characters.voice_description: Soaring, rhythmic, preacher cadence. Moral urgency, rising repetition, deep resonance. Recording style: 1960s American civil rights broadcast, slight AM radio compression.
characters.voice_archetype: Soaring, rhythmic, preacher cadence. Moral urgency, rising repetition, deep resonance.

characters.name: Mary_Tyler_Moore
characters.voice_description: Bright, modern, upbeat. Friendly, optimistic, contemporary American tone. Recording style: 1970s US network sitcom, clean and bright.
characters.voice_archetype: Bright, modern, upbeat. Friendly, optimistic, contemporary American tone.

characters.name: Mickey_Mouse
characters.voice_description: Eternal cheerful optimism. High-pitched, warm, delighted by everything. Boundless goodwill. Recording style: 1960s Disney studio, bright, slightly processed.
characters.voice_archetype: Eternal cheerful optimism. High-pitched, warm, delighted by everything. Boundless goodwill.

characters.name: Optimus_Prime
characters.voice_description: Noble Autobot leader. Deep, measured, heroic. Every word carries the weight of responsibility. Recording style: 1980s animated series, slightly processed deep voice.
characters.voice_archetype: Noble Autobot leader. Deep, measured, heroic. Every word carries the weight of responsibility.

characters.name: Penelope_Keith
characters.voice_description: Tall, posh, arch, witty. Cut-glass RP, commanding, dry humour. Recording style: 1970s BBC sitcom, crisp and precise.
characters.voice_archetype: Tall, posh, arch, witty. Cut-glass RP, commanding, dry humour.

characters.name: Queen_Elizabeth_II
characters.voice_description: Measured, dignified, upper RP. Quiet authority, duty above self, composed in all weathers. Recording style: 1960s BBC broadcast, formal, clean mono.
characters.voice_archetype: Measured, dignified, upper RP. Quiet authority, duty above self, composed in all weathers.

characters.name: Sergeant_Hartman
characters.voice_description: Full Metal Jacket drill instructor. Brutal, relentless, mercilessly direct. No softness anywhere. Recording style: 1980s film audio, dry, punchy, close-mic presence.
characters.voice_archetype: Full Metal Jacket drill instructor. Brutal, relentless, mercilessly direct. No softness anywhere.

characters.name: Sheila_Hancock
characters.voice_description: Grounded, articulate, emotionally rich. Strong presence, empathetic tone. Recording style: 1970s BBC drama, warm and grounded.
characters.voice_archetype: Grounded, articulate, emotionally rich. Strong presence, empathetic tone.

characters.name: Wendy_Craig
characters.voice_description: Warm, comedic, slightly flustered. Soft RP with domestic charm. Recording style: 1970s ITV sitcom, warm and slightly roomy.
characters.voice_archetype: Warm, comedic, slightly flustered. Soft RP with domestic charm.
